title: Connect Gmail to Claude  | Let AI Manage Your Emails Automatically
summary: A tutorial demonstrating how to connect Gmail with Claude using a Gmail Connector to enable AI-powered email management. The video covers secure access setup, summarizing unread messages, and automatically drafting email replies using Claude.
